violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: -milk cooler (lid/gasket held with duct tape) -hot hold display (corner held with duct tape). New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Per PIC, dish machine was in poor repair and not attaining minimum wash temperature. PIC stated work order is in place, parts are on order. Inspector observed temperature gauge non-functional during inspection. Minimum sanitizing temperature was attained as evidenced by test strip turning color. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC stated kitchen staff only use ice to facilitate cooling and/or cold holding with no contact with food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per PIC ice is only used for cold-holding packaged items; not used in foods or beverages. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
Milk cooler lid was observed in poor repair, with duct tape on lid. PIC stated the tape is holding lid together. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Observed a leak at pipes above the dish machine. Plumbing system is to remain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue and biofilm. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
